reason: handoff.md fails handoff_check (dispatcher-side pre-validation; CI is the backstop, not the first gate): role claim: branch 'sde/TASK-003-titlecase' is bot-role work (sde/) but the PR body has no machine-readable gate-role claim — add a line beginning with the word 'role:' followed by one of SAT, SSE, DPC, DCE, PJM, HUMAN. Under ADR-B000 the author-bot cannot review its own PR, so the PR body is the only claim channel gate-writer can parse (§86-C6, MEM-ORG-0004)
